title: stenachaenium megapotamicum var. megapotamicum
intro: Stenachaenium megapotamicum var. megapotamicum is a type of flowering plant, commonly known as a species of the genus Stenachaenium, which belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, inflammation, and digestive issues due to its antipyretic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stenachaenium megapotamicum var. megapotamicum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is often used in folk medicine in various regions of Brazil.
